name: tipGoal
description: Session tip goal in tokens

name: bannedWords
description: Comma-separated words to auto-filter in chat

name: voteOptions
description: Custom tip-vote options (exactly 2 columns: label, value)

name: overlayEnabled
description: Enable overlay event emission

name: hiddenCamPrice
description: Minimum tokens needed for auto-granted hidden cam access

name: hiddenCamMessage
description: Message shown to users when hidden cam is active
default: Hidden cam is active! Tip {{price}}+ tokens for access.

name: tipMenuEnabled
description: Enable the itemised tip menu with discounts

name: tipMenuLabel
description: Label shown above tip options in the tip dialog

name: tipMenuItems
description: Tip menu items (name, description, price in tokens)

name: discountsEnabled
description: Enable per-group and per-user discounts on tip menu items

name: discountEntries
description: Discount rules: group (all/follower/fanclub/mod/regular/user:username), item name or * for all, discount percent (0-100)

name: anonConverterEnabled
description: Enable Anonymous User Converter: periodically blacks out cam for anons

name: anonConverterInterval
description: Seconds between blackout events (default 180 = 3 min)

name: anonConverterBlackoutDuration
description: Seconds the cam is blacked out for anons (default 15)

name: anonConverterMessage
description: Message shown to anons during blackout (use {{link}} for affiliate URL)
default: Uninterrupted cam access for registered users! Sign up free at {{link}}

name: anonConverterAffiliateLink
description: Your Chaturbate affiliate / referral link

name: progressTheme
description: Progress bar color theme (pick from 20 pre-packed themes)

name: progressBarStyle
description: Visual look of the progress bar characters

name: progressTextMode
description: How the progress bar text behaves when content is long

name: notificationCount
description: Maximum number of visible notifications in the rolling queue

name: notificationAutoEnabled
description: Enable auto-mode: periodically posts random notifications at random intervals

name: notificationAutoIntervalMin
description: Minimum seconds between auto notifications (minimum 60)

name: notificationAutoIntervalMax
description: Maximum seconds between auto notifications (minimum 60)

name: notificationReplyEnabled
description: Enable reply-mode: posts context-aware notifications matching user chat messages

name: overlayNotificationsEnabled
description: Show rolling notifications in the OBS broadcast overlay

name: notificationTemplates
description: Custom notification message templates (type, template text, weight)
default: Thank you {{username}} for the {{amount}} token tip! ♡
New follower: {{username}}! ✦ Welcome to the show!
{{username}} just followed! Give them a warm welcome!
Welcome back, {{username}}! Good to see you!
{{username}} joined the fanclub! Thank you so much! ✦
{{username}} purchased {{item}}! Thank you for your support!
✦ Goal reached! {{amount}} tokens total! Thank you everyone!
Having fun? !menu has all the options
Feeling generous? Every tip is appreciated! ✦
Your support makes the show better! ♡
Don't be shy - say hi! !commands for options
Stay tuned - more fun coming up! ✦

name: notificationReplyTemplates
description: Context-aware reply message templates (type, template text, weight). These guide user behavior.
default: There's an option for that in !menu
Glad you're enjoying the show, {{username}} -- !menu has options
Check !menu for available options with prices
So glad you're enjoying it! Check !menu for more
